keyTargets: Hypertrophy: maintain/grow side delts, biceps, triceps, abs, lats, calves
warnings: SI watch: Chest-supported row + Soleus wall-sit are NEW additions; drop immediately on any SI flare.
Phase B running gate: Only 3/7 consecutive symptom-free days banked. Earliest run start ~May 23 (conservative).
highlights: New HR zones locked (Run Z1 ≤143, Row Z1 ≤158, Z2 162–168, Z3 176–183)

exercises.name: Cable lateral raise
exercises.note: Anchor 5/side uni (last session W1 Sat 3 sets RPE 9)

exercises.name: Preacher curl machine, semi-supinated grip
exercises.note: Locked, 5lb increments (last session W3 Wed 50×12 RIR 2)

exercises.name: Cable pushdown, rope
exercises.note: Hold all 3 sets until clean RIR 2 across all (last session W3 Wed 50x12 RIR 1-2 / 50xfail)

exercises.name: Soleus wall-sit isometric
exercises.note: NEW v4.2 addition for Phase A; drop immediately on any SI flare

statusPills.text: Phase B Run Gate: 3/7 clean days

currentLoads.name: Incline BB
currentLoads.note: Last verified W3 Wed 5/6 (125×8 RIR 2); AMRAP W4 Wed 5/13 to re-set TM

currentLoads.name: Chest-supp row
currentLoads.note: NEW (Phase B+); 3×10 RPE 8. Not for Phase A.

thisWeek.label: Hypertrophy B (deferred)
thisWeek.description: Hypertrophy B circuit (~40 min) including seated calf + soleus wall-sit. Max 40 min total lift time.

thisWeek.label: Easy Run + Strides
thisWeek.description: Z1 easy 30–50 min (≤143 bpm) · 4×20s strides. Hill strides gated until Phase B+ SI-clean.

thisWeek.label: Easy Run + Hypertrophy A
thisWeek.description: AM: Z1 easy outdoor 25 min (≤143 bpm) as part of run reintroduction · PM: Hypertrophy A ~40 min (≥6h gap) · Includes soleus wall-sit isometric.

thisWeek.label: Easy Run
thisWeek.description: Z1 easy 30–50 min (≤143 bpm) · optional 4–6 strides after.

thisWeek.label: Easy Run or Rest
thisWeek.description: Z1 easy 25–40 min or full rest day · listen to body.

thisWeek.label: Threshold Run or Row
thisWeek.description: 4×3 min @ Threshold (run or row) + 1 min jog recovery. Z2: 162–168 bpm. (From W4 Reset/Reintro progression).

thisWeek.label: Long Row + Hypertrophy B
thisWeek.description: AM: Long row Z1 35-40 min (≤158 bpm, per new row Z1). Running long runs remain on rower until 2 weeks pain-free Z1 running. · PM: Hypertrophy B ~40 min (≥6h gap) · max 40 min total lift time. Includes seated calf + soleus wall-sit.

nextWeek.label: Rest + Prehab
nextWeek.description: Tyler twists 3×15 + reverse Tyler 3×15 · McGill Big 3 · clamshells 2×15/side · bird-dog 3×8/side · side plank 3×20–30s/side

nextWeek.label: Easy Run + Strides
nextWeek.description: Z1 easy 30 min (≤143 bpm) · 4×20s strides. Hill strides gated until SI clean ≥3 consecutive wks.

nextWeek.label: Threshold + Hypertrophy A
nextWeek.description: AM: Threshold run or row 4×5 min @ T (1 min rec) (≥6h gap) · PM: Hypertrophy A ~40 min · Z2: 162–168 bpm. Includes soleus wall-sit isometric.

nextWeek.label: Easy Run
nextWeek.description: Z1 easy 25 min (≤143 bpm) · optional 4–6 strides after.

nextWeek.label: Easy Run or Rest
nextWeek.description: Z1 easy 25–40 min or full rest day · listen to body.

nextWeek.label: Easy Run + Strides
nextWeek.description: Z1 easy 25 min (≤143 bpm) + 6×20s strides. Quality session type per W5 Base phase.

nextWeek.label: Long Row + Hypertrophy B
nextWeek.description: AM: Long row Z1 45 min (≤158 bpm). Running long runs remain on rower until 2 weeks pain-free Z1 running. · PM: Hypertrophy B ~40 min (≥6h gap) · max 40 min total lift time. Includes seated calf + soleus wall-sit.
